zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Verney於1482年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓時，他的父親Sir John Verney32歲，母親Margaret Whittingham15歲。他於1505年與Margaret Emme Iwardby在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年5月8日在英國賀特福爾阿爾德波利享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Verney于1482年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾米德爾 可萊頓时，他的父亲Sir John Verney32岁，母亲Margaret Whittingham15岁。他于1505年与Margaret Emme Iwardby在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾華頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年5月8日在英国賀特福爾阿爾德波利享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿爾德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Verney was born in 1482, in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John Verney, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Whittingham, was 15. He married Margaret Emme Iwardby in 1505, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 May 1525, in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Verney est né en 1482, à Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Verney, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whittingham, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Emme Iwardby en 1505, à Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1525, à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Verney 1482 in Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Verney 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Whittingham 15. Er hat 1505 in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Emme Iwardby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1525 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Verney è nato il nel 1482 nel Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Verney, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Whittingham, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Emme Iwardby nel 1505, nel Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 maggio 1525, nel Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verneyが1482年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミッドル クレイドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Verneyは32歳，母Margaret Whittinghamは15歳であった。1505年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンでMargaret Emme Iwardbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年5月8日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney(이)가 1482년 영국 벅잉함실르 미들일 클레이던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Verney(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whittingham(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 Margaret Emme Iwardby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 5월 8일 영국 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Verney nasceu em 1482, em Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Verney, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whittingham, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Emme Iwardby em 1505, em Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1525, em Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Verney родился в 1482 г. в местности миддл клеидон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Verney было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whittingham, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Emme Iwardby в 1505 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1525 г. в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Verney nació en 1482, en Middle Claydon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Verney, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Whittingham, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Margaret Emme Iwardby en 1505, en Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1525, en Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
